alert_expected-length-1: Expected string of length 1 but found of length {{size}}
alert_download-error-appended: Please note that download error if any is appended at the end of the file and is marked with special delimiters.
alert_not-production-ready: Please note that this is not a production-ready tool. For production usecases we highly recommend using yt read command from our
alert_not-production-ready-after: instead as it provides advanced features like error detection, download retries, and more.
alert_output-format-errors: There are some values with errors
context_sentinel-placeholder: Please note that sentinels that coerce to number or boolean are not supported
context_dsv-description: Tab-separated key-value format. Please note that this format erases type information due to string conversion.
context_schemaful-dsv-description: Tab-separated format with fixed, ordered set of columns. Please note that this format erases type information due to string conversion.
context_csv-description: Comma-separated format with fixed, ordered set of columns. Please note that this format erases type information due to string conversion.
context_json-description: JSON Lines text format, also called newline-delimited JSON (JavaScript Serialized Object Notation).
